---
title: "Project Title"
subtitle: "Brief subtitle"
author: "Author"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    slide-number: true
    preview-links: auto
    embed-resources: true
    fig-align: center
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

# Section Title

## Background

- Context and motivation
- Key question

## Data & Methods

- Dataset:
- Key tools / pipeline:

## Results

![](../../results/figs/placeholder.png){fig-alt="description of figure"}

## Two-column layout

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Left panel**

![](../../results/figs/fig_left.png){fig-alt="left figure"}
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Right panel**

![](../../results/figs/fig_right.png){fig-alt="right figure"}
:::
:::

## Conclusions

- Finding 1
- Finding 2

## Next steps

-

---

## Slide syntax reference

```markdown
# New section break

## New slide title

- Bullet
- Bullet

![](../../results/figs/fig.png){fig-alt="alt text"}

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
Left
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
Right
:::
:::
```

**Render:** `cd docs/slides && quarto render` → `docs/slides/presentation.html`
**Preview:** `cd docs/slides && quarto preview` (live reload in browser)
